meaning: adj.绂忛煶涔︿綔鑰呯殑,绂忛煶浼犻亾鑰呯殑
examples: There is inconsistency even among prominent evangelistic organisations.
Billy Graham Evangelistic Association spokesman Brent Rinehart said Shea died in Asheville after a brief illness.
Mr Graham founded two of the most powerful organisations in post-war evangelicalism, Christianity Today and the Billy Graham Evangelistic Association.
Even with his advanced age and health issues, Graham remains "actively involved in ministry and writing projects, " his evangelistic association and the hospital said.
